button_click: Clean, simple click sound - crisp and responsive UI feedback. Short transient with no reverb tail. Similar to modern iOS/Android material design clicks. Triggered by generic button clicks throughout the UI.
start_game: Confirmation click combined with an uplifting startup tone. Conveys beginning and excitement. Medium-length sound with positive energy. Triggered when Start button is clicked on StartScreen to begin gameplay.
play_again: Positive click with a restart/refresh tone. Enthusiastic sound suggesting a fresh start. Upbeat and encouraging. Triggered when Play Again button is clicked on ResultsScreen after level complete.
main_menu: Neutral click with a back navigation tone. Softer than forward actions, suggests stepping back or returning. Clean and simple. Triggered when Main Menu button is clicked on ResultsScreen to return to start.
tile_rotate_1: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 1 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).
tile_rotate_2: Satisfying mechanical click/snap sound suggesting rotation. Punchy and tactile, like a puzzle piece turning. Variation 2 of 8. Triggered when user clicks/taps a road tile to rotate it (random selection from 8 variations per GDD spec).

level_complete: Triumphant fanfare/jingle celebrating victory. 3-part structure: intro hit, ascending melody, resolution. Uplifting and celebratory. Full range with emphasis on bright high frequencies. Similar to Mario level complete or Zelda puzzle solved. Duration: 1-2 seconds. Triggered when all landmarks are connected to exits and level objectives are completed.
landmark_connect: Melodic success chime with ascending tone. Achievement unlocked feel, connection made sound. Could use musical intervals (thirds, fifths). Warm and satisfying mid-range frequencies. Triggered when a landmark successfully connects to an exit via completed path.
